text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Today presents a new opportunity to put my
winning equation to the test.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Imperfect though it may yet be, I will complete it and use it to beat every single opponent I face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And even if the probability of winning is a mere
one percent, I still intend to beat them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I take it you're on my side?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Folks, it's time for the Kikuka Sho, the final race
of the Classic Triple Crown! Biwa Hayahide has
made her way to the paddock now...

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Hm? So that's Biwa Hayahide? She looks to be in
fantastic shape. Just what kind of training did she
do to achieve such a powerful physique?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You'd better believe I've been training
hard. I'm here to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My winning equation is just what it sounds like—a
formula for victory!
